content: Arduino Nano board based on the RP2040 microcontroller with a dual-core 133 MHz ARM Cortex-M0+ processor, 264 kB SRAM, and up to 16 MB flash memory. Operates at 3.3V, with 5V Micro USB input and 4-20V VIN. Features Wi-Fi®, Bluetooth® LE, digital and analog pins, and supports SPI, I2C, UART, and PIO. Includes a 6-axis IMU, RGB LED, microphone, and cryptographic chip for secure communication.
